title: Buttery Dense Adventurous Thai Wholegrain Bread Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly and adventurous dish that combines the savory flavors of Thailand with the hearty texture of wholegrain bread in a buttery, dense stir-fry.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Fold in wholegrain bread slices, cooking until lightly browned on both sides (approximately 5 minutes).
If using fresh chili peppers, add them now and stir-fry for another minute or two.
Pour vegetable broth or water into the pan, scraping any stuck bits from the bottom of the pan to enhance flavor. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for about 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Stir in Thai basil leaves and adjust seasoning as needed with salt and pepper.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
